zh.Netherfield, Sussex, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭素可瑟費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Parnell Allard於大約1322年出生在英國素可文爾希亞時，她的父親Nicholas Allard16歲，母親Elizabeth Allard of Winchelsea12歲。她於1355年與Henry Herbert Finch在英國素可文爾希亞結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1400年在英國素可瑟費爾德享年80歲。

zh-hans.Netherfield, Sussex, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰素可瑟費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Parnell Allard于大约1322年出生在英国素可文爾希亞时，她的父亲Nicholas Allard16岁，母亲Elizabeth Allard of Winchelsea12岁。她于1355年与Henry Herbert Finch在英国素可文爾希亞结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1400年在英国素可瑟費爾德享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Allard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gilles, Andre, Emile, Normand, Marcel, Alain, Armand, Gaston, Pierre, Antoine, Benoit, Fernand.

English: from a Middle English personal name, Alard, Adelard, Aylard, or Elard. The former two names are usually of native English origin, from Old English Æthelheard, composed of the elements æthel ‘noble’ + heard ‘hard, bold’. Alternatively, the surname may be of continental origin, from an ancient Germanic name (see 2 below), which developed in Old French to Alard, and in Middle Dutch to Adelaert and Alaert. The continental names were used in post-Conquest England by Normans and Flemings. Later development of -ard to -ett and -att in surnames means that these personal names may also lie behind some examples of e.g. Allatt and Hallett .
French: from the medieval personal name Alard, from ancient Germanic Adelhard, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘hardy’. Compare Allar , Allor , Allord , and Allore .

variants.name: Ellerd
meanings: English (Bedfordshire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Allard  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.
Probably an altered form of German Ellert, a variant of Ehlert.

variants.name: Ellert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Merwin, Traude.

variants.name: Hallett
meanings: English (mainly Somerset and Dorset): variant of Allatt, itself a variant of Allard , with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: Parnell
meanings: A female name corrupted from Petronilla.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Parnell Allard was born about 1322, in Winchelsea, Sussex, England, her father, Nicholas Allard, was 16 and her mother, Elizabeth Allard of Winchelsea, was 12. She married Henry Herbert Finch in 1355, in Winchelsea, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died about 1400, in Netherfield, Sussex, England, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Parnell Allard est née environ 1322, à Winchelsea, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Allard, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Allard of Winchelsea, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Herbert Finch en 1355, à Winchelsea, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1400, à Netherfield, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Parnell Allard um 1322 in Winchelsea, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Allard 16 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Allard of Winchelsea 12. Sie hat 1355 in Winchelsea, Sussex, England Henry Herbert Finch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1400 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Netherfield, Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Parnell Allard è nata il circa 1322 nel Winchelsea, Sussex, England, sua padre, Nicholas Allard, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Allard of Winchelsea, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Henry Herbert Finch nel 1355, nel Winchelsea, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1400, nel Netherfield, Sussex, England, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Parnell Allardが約1322年にイギリススセックスウィンチェルセアで生まれた時，父Nicholas Allardは16歳，母Elizabeth Allard of Winchelseaは12歳であった。1355年にイギリススセックスウィンチェルセアでHenry Herbert Finchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1400年にイギリススセックスネスエルフィールドで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Parnell Allard(이)가 대략 1322년 영국 수세스 윈헬시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Allard(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Allard of Winchelsea(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1355년 영국 수세스 윈헬시에서 Henry Herbert Finch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1400년 영국 수세스 네더필드에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Parnell Allard nasceu aproximadamente 1322, em Winchelsea, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Allard, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Allard of Winchelsea, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Herbert Finch em 1355, em Winchelsea, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1400, em Netherfield, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Parnell Allard родилась около 1322 г. в местности винчелсеа, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Allard было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Allard of Winchelsea, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Herbert Finch в 1355 г. в местности винчелсеа, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла около 1400 г. в местности нетирфиелд, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 80 лет.
